Name: Pict Panel
Tagline: Hot-loadable control panel component for browser applications
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>

			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z" fill="#d815e9"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-pict-panel-filled-light)"><path d="M 13.31 57.64 A 36 36 0 0 1 82.69 38.36 Z" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" opacity="0.95"/>
					<path d="M 13.31 57.64 A 36 36 0 0 0 82.69 38.36 Z" fill="#54b5f3" opacity="0.95"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"

			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PP</text>
	</svg>
